sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, str_column String, another_column Int32);
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (1, 'ClickHouse is fast'), (2, 'The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog'), (3, NULL), (4, 'Data processing'), (5, 'Unique UNIQUE!');
SELECT wordShingleMinHashArgCaseInsensitive(str_column, 2, 4) AS minmax_hashes FROM test_table WHERE id < 3;

SELECT (SELECT count(*) FROM test_table WHERE NULL < another_column) AS null_comparison, wordShingleMinHashArgCaseInsensitive(str_column, 1, 3) FROM test_table HAVING minmax_hashes.1 < minmax_hashes.2;

SELECT str_column, another_column FROM test_table WHERE wordShingleMinHashArgCaseInsensitive(str_column) < (SELECT wordShingleMinHashArgCaseInsensitive('Lazy dogs are not slow', 1, 6) FROM test_table) AND str_column IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, wordShingleMinHashArgCaseInsensitive(str_column, 3, 5) FROM test_table GROUP BY id HAVING another_column < 3;
CREATE TABLE temp_table AS SELECT id, wordShingleMinHashArgCaseInsensitive(str_column, 4, 4) AS hash_result FROM test_table WHERE str_column IS NOT NULL;
INSERT INTO temp_table SELECT id, wordShingleMinHashArgCaseInsensitive(CONCAT(str_column, ' CTOR!'), 1, 2) FROM test_table WHERE str_column LIKE 'C%';
SELECT hash_result FROM temp_table WHERE hash_result.1 < (SELECT wordShingleMinHashArgCaseInsensitive('She sells sea shells by the sea shore', 3, 1) FROM temp_table);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT wordShingleMinHashArgCaseInsensitive(str_column, 3, 5) AS hashes FROM test_table WHERE another_column < 10) AS derived_table WHERE hashes.1 IS NULL;
